subcodes.first_line: Blessed is the soul that hath, in these wondrous and transcendent days, quaffed from the chalice of divine knowledge and turned towards the All-Merciful - how glorious [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: مبارک نفسیکه در این ایام بدیع منیع از کاس عرفان آشامید و بشطر رحمن مقبل شد چه مقدار
subcodes.subjects: @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @praise and encouragement, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
